message:
web: Improve Grep tool rendering with CLI args and syntax highlighting

- Show CLI-style args in Grep tool description (e.g., -A 30

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/bwvbnhu9xfqufp7guaraefrv"pattern" path)
- Add GrepContentViewer for content mode with syntax-highlighted excerpts
- Use FileViewer with startLine for correct line number display
- Differentiate rendering between content mode and files_with_matches mode
